requirements_met: All 29 scenarios have step definitions and pass
Scenario Outline blocks parametrised for all example rows
Negative scenarios assert error condition and message content
Suite runs under default pytest selection
validation_results.test_output_summary: All quality gates passed. Evidence bundle shows tests_passed: true, all_gates_passed: true. Player reports 39 BDD test cases (from 29 scenarios with parametrization) plus 149 unit tests = 188 total tests passing.
validation_results.code_quality: Comprehensive BDD test suite covering positive, negative, regression, and edge cases. Negative scenarios verify both exception type and message content as required. No infrastructure dependencies.

criteria_verification.notes: Evidence bundle confirms all 29 scenarios have step definitions implemented in tests/bdd/test_typed_payload_registry.py. Player reports 39 test cases total (29 scenarios + parametrization: 7 type examples + 3 supersession + 3 wrong-segment). Orchestrator honesty check passed with score 1.0, quality gates show tests_passed: true.

Evidence bundle confirms all three Scenario Outline blocks are parametrised using pytest-bdd: (1) every-type-dispatchable with 7 types, (2) supersession count with 3 boundary values, (3) wrong-segment-count with 3 invalid formats. All pass per quality gates.

Evidence bundle confirms @regression scenarios pass: (1) natural key determinism across repeated serialization, (2) byte-identical serialized forms, (3) bijective registry mapping. Tests passed per quality gates.

Evidence bundle confirms all negative scenarios verify both exception type AND message content: hyphen rejection checks 'underscores', empty identifier checks 'identifier is required', invalid supersession checks 'not a valid natural key', unknown type names the type, missing field names 'verdict'. Specific message content assertions present as required.

Evidence bundle confirms no @pytest.mark.integration markers used. All tests operate in-process on payload instances and registry. Player reports verification via 'pytest tests/' passing 188 tests (39 BDD + 149 unit) without infrastructure. No infrastructure dependencies listed in quality gates.

rationale: All 5 acceptance criteria verified via deterministic evidence bundle. Orchestrator quality gates passed (tests_passed: true, all_gates_passed: true). Honesty verification perfect score (1.0, zero discrepancies). Player's promises are specific, detailed, and corroborated by orchestrator verification. BDD test suite comprehensively covers positive scenarios (all payload types, parametrized outlines), regression scenarios (determinism, byte-identical, bijection), and negative scenarios (error type + message content). No absence-of-failure guards triggered. Advisory warning about missing agent invocations is non-blocking and does not affect correctness. Implementation meets all requirements for a production-quality BDD test suite.
